summary: Synthetic apartment review fixture with generic zones, no private home data, and no raw capture references.

findings.title: Zone transition lacks clear review evidence
findings.summary: The review notes a possible spacing concern between Zone A and Zone B, but the fixture keeps the evidence synthetic and does not name real rooms, coordinates, residents, or capture paths.
findings.recommendation: Ask the caller-owned adapter for a sanitized evidence label or omit the claim from the shared review artifact.

findings.title: Caller action remains outside the shared contract
findings.summary: The fixture can identify a generic review concern, but any interpretation as a real apartment change, household action, or capture-retention decision stays caller-owned.
findings.recommendation: Keep action routing and real-world household context in the embedding repo.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: No real room names, image paths, coordinates, resident details, or private household facts

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic apartment review fixture with generic zones only.

## Findings
- Medium: Zone transition lacks clear review evidence.
- Low: Caller action remains outside the shared contract.

## Boundary
No real room names, image paths, coordinates, resident details, or private household facts are part of this fixture.
